Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total waiting time to the Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in variants that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in successful variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without rejections
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include a pre-approver step versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to be followed by any rejection activity (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION, Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' or activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'"}"
